name: camera-fleet
description: Multi-device camera fleet: a USB/MJPEG camera component deployed to every device in a named group (edge tier) + a self-populating camera-wall dashboard (central tier) that auto-discovers all of them. Demonstrates the fleet 'central + edge' topology — placement manifest + cross-device service discovery (WDY-1755). No hardcoded camera URLs or ports.

variables.name: CAMERA_GROUP
variables.description: Device tag (glob) the camera component deploys to — a device matches when its name matches this pattern (e.g. camera-*). The dashboard discovers every match automatically.

variables.name: CAMERA_PORT
variables.description: HTTP port each camera serves its MJPEG stream on

variables.name: DASHBOARD_PORT
variables.description: HTTP port the central dashboard serves on — open http://<central>:<port>

variables.name: VIDEO_DEVICE
variables.description: V4L2 device for the webcam on each edge device (e.g. /dev/video0, or an index like 0). Run `v4l2-ctl --list-devices` on a host if unsure.
